mapper.select: SELECT g.id AS goods_id, g.name AS goods_name, g.price, g.image, g.description, g.category_id, g.create_date_time, g.delete_date_time, g.is_deleted, c.name AS category_name FROM goods AS g INNER JOIN category AS c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods ( name, price, image, description, category_id, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET name = #{name}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, delete_date_time = #{deleteDateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
